hero.title: Authentic
hero.description: Leave the coast behind for a half-day in the mountains to discover the soul of Amazigh culture and the warmth of village life through our traditional cooking class.

packages.title: Cooking Class Packages
packages.description: Immerse yourself in authentic Amazigh culture with our mountain cooking experiences

experiences.title: Discover Authentic Morocco
experiences.description: Five unique culinary experiences, each telling a story of Moroccan culture, tradition, and the warmth of Berber hospitality.
experiences.ctaDescription: Book your authentic Moroccan cooking experience today and create unforgettable memories in the Atlas Mountains.

tajine.title: Tajine Masterclass
tajine.subtitle: Morocco's Iconic Dish
tajine.description: Master the art of Morocco's most iconic dish in this comprehensive class.
tajine.longDescription: Master the art of Morocco's most iconic dish in this comprehensive class. Learn to prepare slow-cooked tagines with aromatic spices, tender meats, and vegetables in traditional clay pots, achieving the perfect balance of flavors that makes Moroccan tagine world-renowned.

amazigh.title: Amazigh Heritage
amazigh.subtitle: Ancient Berber Traditions
amazigh.description: Immerse yourself in authentic Amazigh culture and culinary traditions.
amazigh.longDescription: Immerse yourself in authentic Amazigh culture and culinary traditions. Learn ancient cooking methods, traditional recipes, and the rich cultural stories behind Amazigh cuisine passed down through generations in the Atlas Mountains.

tea.title: Tea Ceremony
tea.subtitle: The Art of Moroccan Mint Tea
tea.description: Experience the elegance of traditional Moroccan tea ceremony.
tea.longDescription: Experience the elegance of traditional Moroccan tea ceremony. Learn the proper techniques for brewing perfect mint tea, master the iconic high-pour method, and understand the cultural significance of tea in Moroccan hospitality.

bread.title: Clay Oven Bread
bread.subtitle: Wood-Fired Tradition
bread.description: Experience the ancient art of baking traditional Moroccan bread.
bread.longDescription: Experience the ancient art of baking traditional Moroccan bread in a wood-fired clay oven. From kneading dough by hand to achieving the perfect golden crust, learn authentic Amazigh bread-making techniques that have remained unchanged for centuries.

amlou.title: Amlou Workshop
amlou.subtitle: Liquid Gold of Morocco
amlou.description: Discover the secrets of making traditional Moroccan amlou.
amlou.longDescription: Discover the secrets of making traditional Moroccan amlou - a delicious blend of argan oil, roasted almonds, and honey. Learn traditional grinding techniques using ancient millstones and achieve the perfect consistency for this beloved Berber spread.

booking.title: Start Your Culinary Journey
booking.description: Fill out the form below and we'll contact you to confirm your booking.
booking.allergiesPlaceholder: Please let us know about any allergies or special requirements
booking.successMessage: Thank you for your booking request! We'll contact you shortly to confirm your experience.
booking.disclaimer: By submitting this form, your booking request will be saved and we'll contact you shortly to confirm.

footer.description: Learn authentic Amazigh recipes passed down through generations in the heart of Tamraght, Morocco.

heroSection.description: Go beyond the restaurants and learn to cook like a local. Our authentic Berber cooking class takes you into a traditional village home just 15 minutes above the Taghazout coast. You will master the art of the clay-pot tagine, learn to bake traditional mountain bread, and discover the secret spice blends of the Atlas Mountains. This immersive half-day experience is the perfect way to discover Amazigh and Berber culture through its most famous flavors.

experience.title: THE JOURNEY
experience.subtitle: An Immersive Moroccan Experience
experience.description: Experience an authentic Morocco stay in a traditional workshop designed to let you live exactly like a local.

step1.title: Pickup & Journey
step1.subtitle: Your Adventure Begins
step1.description: We pick you up from Taghazout and take you on a scenic 15-20 minute drive through the stunning Moroccan countryside to an authentic traditional home. Watch the landscape transform as we leave the coast behind.
highlights: Comfortable pickup in from Taghazout Mosque

step2.title: Traditional Kitchen Tour
step2.subtitle: Where Magic Happens
step2.description: Step into an authentic Moroccan kitchen and discover the traditional tools and techniques that have been used for generations. See the wood-fired oven, traditional tagines, and the workspace where you'll create your feast.
highlights: Make your own tea with the local herbs
Enjoy tea with Moroccan handmade sweets

step3.title: Hands-On Cooking
step3.subtitle: Recipes From Generations
step3.description: In a real Moroccan kitchen, learn authentic cooking techniques passed down through generations. From preparing tagine to baking fresh bread in a traditional wood-fired oven—this is cooking as it's meant to be.
highlights: Prepare local Berber tagine (salty and sweet)

step4.title: Feast & Return
step4.subtitle: The Heart of Hospitality
step4.description: Gather around the table in a traditional Moroccan home to enjoy the incredible meal you've created. Share stories, laughter, and experience true Moroccan hospitality before we drive you back to Taghazout.
highlights: Mint tea with a sunset view

experience.finalDescription: Join us for a journey that goes beyond cooking. This is connection, culture, and community—all wrapped in the warmth of Moroccan hospitality.

community.title: Your Meal Supports Local Children
community.description: Every cooking class directly benefits children in Tamsoult village. We provide school supplies, nutritious meals, and educational support to over 10 children each month.
community.quote: In Amazigh culture, we believe cooking is not just about food – it's about nourishing our community. When you cook with me, you become part of our village family.

reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.description: Real experiences from travelers who joined our cooking classes

location.title: Your Journey to Rabab's Kitchen
location.description: From the moment you land, we take care of everything. Here's what your journey looks like.

step1.title: Land at Agadir Airport
step1.description: We'll be waiting to pick you up - free for all guests!

step2.title: Scenic Coastal Drive
step2.description: Enjoy beautiful Atlantic Ocean views along the way.

step3.title: Arrive in Taghazout
step3.description: Enter our traditional Amazigh village home.

step4.title: Meet Rabab
step4.description: Welcome tea and begin your culinary adventure!

events.description: Immerse yourself in the rich musical heritage of the Souss-Massa region. Experience traditional Ahwach performances, cultural storytelling, and authentic Amazigh music every Thursday night.

ahwach.title: Ahwach Performance
ahwach.description: Watch authentic Ahwach dance and music performed in traditional circles, combining singing, dancing, and poetry led by local Amazigh artists.

storytelling.title: Cultural Storytelling
storytelling.description: Experience traditional poetry and stories that have been passed down through generations, celebrating Amazigh heritage and connection to the land.

musicians.title: Live Musicians
musicians.description: Enjoy live performances featuring traditional instruments including the Bendir drum, Ribab string instrument, and the Talâouwadt flute.

teaRefreshments.title: Tea & Refreshments
teaRefreshments.description: Enjoy traditional Moroccan mint tea and local sweets in the authentic atmosphere of an Amazigh cultural gathering.

events.ctaDescription: Experience the soul of Amazigh culture through music and storytelling.

packagesPage.title: Cooking Class
packagesPage.description: Immerse yourself in authentic Berber culture. Experience traditional village life and an ancestral cooking journey. Located just 15 mins from the Taghazout coast.
packagesPage.readyDescription: Book your {name} today and create unforgettable memories

basic.name: Basic Package
basic.subtitle: Half-Day Authentic Berber Cultural Experience Above Taghazout

itinerary.title: The Scenic Ascent
itinerary.description: Meet us at the Taghazout Mosque for a comfortable 15-minute drive into the Small Atlas Mountains. We'll wind through the Argan forest, where you can breathe the fresh mountain air and enjoy a breathtaking panoramic view of the ocean from above.

itinerary.title: A Warm Village Welcome
itinerary.description: Arrive at our village and step inside an ancient 300-year-old Amazigh house, one of the oldest in North Africa. Meet the local family and I will be your guided tour to show you how our ancestors lived in the heart of these mountains.

itinerary.title: The Garden Tea Ritual
itinerary.description: Relax in our authentic workshop and learn the art of Moroccan tea. You'll pick fresh mint and herbs directly from our small garden to brew your own pot. Enjoy your tea with homemade Moroccan sweets I've prepared for you, as we sit together for a warm conversation to get to know one another.

itinerary.title: Prepare The Traditional Bread
itinerary.description: Master the ancient art of village bread. You will knead your own dough by hand before baking it in our traditional stone oven. We fire the hearth with Argan wood, infusing the bread with a rich, smoky aroma and a golden crust that you can only find in the heart of the mountains.

itinerary.title: The Tagine Workshop
itinerary.description: Prepare an authentic Tagine by cleaning fresh vegetables, marinating your chicken or fish in special Moroccan spices, and mastering the sweet and salty combination as it slow-cooks over an Argan wood fire for a delicious, smoky aroma.

itinerary.title: The Ancient Millstone
itinerary.description: Experience the magic of making your own Amlou using a traditional stone millstone—one of our most ancient tools that we still preserve and use today. You will grind toasted almonds by hand, blending them with pure Argan oil and orange honey to create the most delicious spread you can taste in Morocco.

itinerary.title: The Family Feast & Sunset
itinerary.description: After half day of tradition and cooking, it is time to sit together as one family. Enjoy the delicious meal you created, sharing stories and laughter over the steaming Tagine and fresh bread. It is more than just a dinner; it is a moment of true Moroccan hospitality in the peaceful heart of the mountains, watching the sunset over the Atlas peaks before we begin our journey back to Taghazout.

itinerary.title: Journey Home
itinerary.description: After the sun sets and we've shared our final goodbyes, we begin the scenic drive back, dropping you directly in Taghazout or Tamraght by 19:30 – 20:00.

includes: Pick up from Taghazout Mosque at 13:30

weeklyEvent.name: Weekly Event
weeklyEvent.subtitle: Join us for our Weekly Berber Music Event At Sunset in a traditional village

itinerary.title: Event Details Coming Soon
itinerary.description: Join us for our special weekly cooking event. More details will be announced soon. This is a unique opportunity to experience Moroccan cooking in a communal setting.

private.name: Private Package
private.subtitle: Personalized journey for you and your group

itinerary.title: Private Pickup
itinerary.description: We'll pick you up from your accommodation at your preferred time. Enjoy a comfortable private drive through the Argan forest with stunning ocean views from the mountains.

itinerary.title: Exclusive House Welcome
itinerary.description: Private tour of our ancient 300-year-old Amazigh house. Take your time exploring and learning about our ancestral way of life with personalized attention.

itinerary.title: Personalized Tea Ceremony
itinerary.description: Private tea ceremony in our garden. Pick your own fresh herbs and learn the authentic Moroccan tea ritual at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Bread Making Workshop
itinerary.description: Exclusive bread-making session. Knead your dough and bake it in our traditional stone oven with Argan wood, creating that signature smoky flavor.

itinerary.title: Custom Tagine Creation
itinerary.description: Choose your preferred ingredients and create your personalized tagine. We'll accommodate dietary preferences and teach you the authentic techniques with individual attention.

itinerary.title: Amlou Making Experience
itinerary.description: Private session using our ancient millstone. Grind toasted almonds by hand and blend with pure Argan oil and honey to create authentic Amlou.

itinerary.title: Private Family Feast
itinerary.description: Enjoy your meal in an intimate setting with your group. Share stories and experience genuine Moroccan hospitality while watching the sunset over the Atlas Mountains.

itinerary.title: Private Return Journey
itinerary.description: Comfortable private transport back to your accommodation at your preferred time.

meetTheChef.title: Your Host &
meetTheChef.paragraph1: My name is Rabab, and I was born and raised in the Atlas Mountains. With a background in Business Management, I decided in 2024 to launch my own project: an authentic cooking class and cultural experience.
meetTheChef.paragraph2: As an Amazigh woman, my mission is to share my culture with the world and the travelers who come to the Taghazout area.
meetTheChef.paragraph3: Located just 15 minutes above Taghazout, I have started a local workshop that is a direct collaboration with village women. This project is designed to give an authentic and immersive experience to those who want to discover the real Morocco beyond the surf.
meetTheChef.paragraph4: In my workshop, I teach you how to prepare Amazigh food using the original tools and techniques of my roots, which have been passed down for 10,000 years in North Africa.
meetTheChef.paragraph5: By joining my workshop, you are helping me bring value to these local women, allowing them to be productive and earn the financial independence they need to support their families.
meetTheChef.ctaDescription: Join me in the mountains for an authentic cultural experience and support our local community.

kitchen.heroSubtitle: Where 10,000 Years of Tradition Comes Alive
kitchen.introP1: Step into an authentic Amazigh kitchen where time-honored traditions meet the warmth of Moroccan hospitality. Every tool, every technique, and every recipe tells a story passed down through generations.
kitchen.introP2: Our kitchen is equipped with traditional wood-fired ovens, handcrafted tagines, and the same tools that have been used for thousands of years. This is not a modern cooking studio—this is where real Moroccan food is born.
kitchen.featuresSubtitle: Experience cooking the way it has been done for millennia

location.heroSubtitle: 15 Minutes Above Taghazout in the Atlas Mountains
location.introP1: Our traditional home is located just 15-20 minutes above the coastal village of Taghazout, in the stunning Atlas Mountains. This authentic Amazigh village offers breathtaking views, fresh mountain air, and a genuine connection to Moroccan culture.
location.introP2: The scenic drive from Taghazout takes you through winding mountain roads, past argan trees, and into a landscape that has remained unchanged for centuries. This is where tradition lives, and where your culinary journey begins.
location.mapSubtitle: Located in Taghazout, Morocco - Gateway to the Atlas Mountains
location.featuresSubtitle: More than just a cooking class - it's a journey into authentic Moroccan life
